chinese_news.title: 氪星晚报 ｜宇树科技发布载人机甲，投资人回应；京东：第一季度营收3157亿元，日本恩格尔系数创1980年以来最高水平同比增长4.9%
chinese_news.summary:
大公司：

京东：第一季度营收3157亿元，同比增长4.9%

36氪获悉，京东发布2026年第一季度财报，第一季度营收3157亿元，同比增长4.9%；非美国通用会计准则下（Non-GAAP）归母净利润74亿元；京东零售经营利润率提升至5.6%，经营利润创历史新高。截至一季度，京东年度活跃用户数超7.4亿，季度活跃用户数实现连续10个季度的同比双位数增长。京东体系研发投入在一季度同比增长59%。

华硕第一季度营收2083.7亿元台币

华硕第一季度营收2083.7亿元台币，预估2001.3亿元台币；营业利润119.0亿元台币。（财联社）

宇树科技发布载人机甲，投资人回应

5月12日，宇树发布GD01载人变形机甲GD01，定价390万元起。宇树创始人王兴兴亲自登上机甲驾驶舱，并演示了一段真人操作。根据官方介绍，该产品为全球首款量产版载人机甲，可以变形，民用交通工具，体重约500

chinese_news.title: Walulu：用六个月撕开一条新赛道
chinese_news.summary:
文丨果脯

近日，成都雨之灵动科技有限公司（后称雨之灵动）宣布完成总额数千万人民币的天使轮及Pre-A轮融资。

目前其投资方阵容已颇为亮眼，包含KK集团、4399、科大讯飞和一家知名财务投资机构，涵盖了财务资本、渠道资源、游戏行业及AI技术四大维度。做到这种程度，基本已经覆盖了一家AI消费品公司的所需的核心拼图。

雨之灵动能同时吸引到这四类资方，一定程度上说明他们的项目不仅打动了财务投资人的直觉，也获得了产品方对其产品的市场期望。

雨之灵动的核心产品是AI仿生毛绒宠物Walulu。在公司创始人兼CEO顾小毛的愿景中，他们希望将Walulu打造成“AI时代的宝可梦”。

这并非雨之灵动最早的想法。2023年，他们决定ALL in AI时，首选的方向是自研垂类大模型。团队第一时间自购GPU并组建算法团队，持续交付了多个百万级的政府与B端项目。

同期，他们也开始探索2C路径，依托AI视频生成能力产出过多个爆款内容，单视频最高曾获得千万级曝光。后续他们还计划构建一站式IP生成平台，签约

chinese_news.title: 36氪首发｜新加坡博士团队创业获种子轮融资，首款产品做“会飞的家庭管家”
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 乔钰杰

编辑 | 袁斯来

硬氪获悉，深圳熵约智能科技有限公司（下称“熵约科技”）日前完成数百万美元种子轮融资，本轮融资由初心资本独家投资。

熵约科技由新加坡南洋理工大学博士曾武，马来西亚理科大学博士况伟杰，清华智能产业研究院研究员万浩诚共同创立，核心团队成员来自清华大学、华中科技大学，南京航空航天大学，字节跳动，比亚迪等高校和企业，背景覆盖人工智能、理论物理与微型无人机系统。

目前，熵约科技的首款产品针对家庭空间设计，为全球首款家庭飞行机器人Flyer O1。

chinese_news.title: 8点1氪丨美国总统特朗普：非常期待中国之行  ；OPPO发布母亲节文案事件问责通告；快手计划分拆可灵AI，融资20亿美元

今日热点导览

天舟十号货运飞船与空间站组合体完成交会对接

国家广播电视总局：4月经备案国产电视动画片51部、9659分钟

任天堂股价因Switch 2游戏前景不佳大幅下跌

千问与淘宝打通，正式上线AI购物

TOP3大新闻

美国总统特朗普：非常期待中国之行

外交部发言人宣布：应国家主席习近平邀请，美利坚合众国总统唐纳德·特朗普将于5月13日至15日对中国进行国事访问。

当地时间5月11日，美国总统特朗普在其社交媒体“真实社交”发文表示，非常期待即将开启的中国之行，并称中国是“一个令人惊叹的国家”。(央视新闻)

OPPO就母亲节文案事件发布问责通告，高级副总裁职级直降两级

5月11日，界面新闻独家获悉，就OPPO因母亲节不当文案事件，OPPO5月11日内部正式发布问责通告，对相关责任人进行了定级处罚

chinese_news.title: 量子计算走出“科幻片”，「波色量子」在肿瘤、脑机等领域交出百余个落地案例
chinese_news.summary:
文｜胡香赟

编辑｜海若镜

在科幻电影《流浪地球2》中，拥有指数级运算能力的智能量子计算机“MOSS”，不仅能统筹起全世界的计算资源，支撑1万台“行星发动机”同步运转，还承载足“数字生命计划”那海量的、近乎无底洞般的计算需求，引��大众对量子计算机的无限遐想。这种曾经令人惊叹的科幻设定，如今已慢慢从实验室走向商业化落地。

按照“十五五规划纲要”，量子科技已被列入六大未来产业之一；市场层面的热度同样高涨：据IT桔子数据，到今年4月，国内量子计算赛道中的企业已超过90家，TOP 10企业的总估值逼近500亿元。其中，那些拥有海外顶尖学术背景和成熟产业经历的市场化团队，在这一轮资本竞逐中更受青睐，估值水平也相对高于同类企业。

成立于2020年的波色量子就是其中之一。波色量子并未依附于某家科研院所，但已拿到11轮融资，累计金额达18.4亿元。今年3月完成的10亿元B轮融资，直接创下国内量子计算领域单轮融资纪录。团队构成方面，创始人、CEO文凯博士毕业于斯坦福大学，师从量子计算领域权威学者山本喜久；COO马寅曾在航天行业

chinese_news.title: 氪星晚报 ｜千问与淘宝打通，正式上线AI购物；泡泡玛特将在5月13日举行2026年一季度业务更新电话会
chinese_news.summary:
大公司：

百济神州：第一季度净利润为16.08亿元，同比扭亏为盈

36氪获悉，百济神州发布2026年一季度业绩报告。报告显示，2026年第一季度实现营业收入105.44亿元，同比增长31.0%；归属于上市公司股东的净利润为16.08亿元，上年同期亏损，同比扭亏为盈。业绩变动主要系产品收入增长和费用管理推动了经营效率的提升。

营收确认规则是否存在调整可能？贵州茅台回应

5月11日，贵州茅台召开2025年度及2026年第一季度业绩说明会。会上，针对公司营业收入确认规则以及后续是否存在调整的可能的提问，贵州茅台财务总监、代董事会秘书余思明回应表示，公司严格按照财政部《企业会计准则第14号——收入》要求，在客户取得相关商品控制权时确认收入。其中，自营渠道（含i茅台）以客户确认收货为准，社会经销渠道以经销商签收货物为准。（每经网）

仙坛股份：4月鸡肉产品销售收入5.32亿元，环比增长15.9%</

chinese_news.title: 理想整车研发负责人刘立国：说理想不重视技术，是大大的误解
chinese_news.summary:
理想汽车整车电动研发高级副总裁 刘立国

文｜肖漫

编辑｜李勤

走过10年造车历程后，新势力阵营已经普遍从“轻盈”走向“厚重”。尤其是理想汽车，这家公司高呼成为“ 具身智能企业”，但也同时在垒高每一块整车技术能力。

尤其是过去4年，理想汽车几乎重构了底盘系统，联合供应商深度共创了底盘三大项：EMB刹车+800V主动悬架+线控转向。

理想在电池上也在进行自制布局，同时，在自身起家的增程技术上，理想也走到了自研自制阶段

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Bitcoin close above $65,000 on June 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Bitcoin's bull-bear cycle indicator just turned green for first time since March 2023; geopolitical tensions (Iran war) and Fed policy uncertainty from Warsh confirmation create volatility window.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk: 'Bitcoin's bull-bear cycle indicator turns green for first time since March 2023'

prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: ETH derivatives showing resilience despite DeFi hack headlines; privacy narrative heating up (Arc, Canton, Tempo topping $1B funding) could drive institutional demand.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: Cointelegraph: 'Ethereum derivatives unfazed by DeFi hacks: Can ETH hit $2.6K next?'; CoinDesk privacy funding surge

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the Fed raise rates by more than 0.5% (50 bps) before December 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: US inflation jumped to 3.8% (highest since May 2023) driven by Iran war energy costs; Kevin Warsh just confirmed to Fed board with Chair vote expected—signals hawkish pivot possible.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: BBC World: 'US inflation jumps to 3.8% as energy costs surge from Iran war'; CoinDesk: 'Senate confirms Kevin Warsh to Fed board ahead of expected Chair vote'

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will XRP/USD close above $3.00 on August 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: XRP ETFs logged largest inflow since January; traders citing growing bullishness; crypto market structure bill advancing in Senate could unlock regulatory clarity.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: Cointelegraph: 'XRP traders say bullishness growing as ETFs log largest inflow since January'; Cointelegraph crypto market structure bill markup

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Brent crude oil average above $85/barrel in Q3 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Iran war now in third month with Strait of Hormuz locked down; Trump threatens resumption without Congress approval; oil prices surging globally with broad inflation spillover.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: 'Trump doesn't need Congress to restart Iran strikes: Hegseth'; BBC World: 'Trump says Iran ceasefire is on massive life support'

market_questions_to_create.question: Will NVIDIA close above $140 on June 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: NASDAQ official closing price for NVDA
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: GPU rental price futures just launched (CNBC), signaling institutional hedging demand; AI capex cycle still accelerating per Google/Gemini Android rollout news, but market may not price sustained margin compression from competition.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Traders racing to hedge GPU costs; Google positioning Gemini across Android ecosystem signals competitive price pressure on GPU suppliers.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the U.S. implement a federal gas tax suspension (any duration) by December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: U.S. Federal Register or official Congressional legislative tracking (Congress.gov); Treasury announcement
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Trump floated the idea but slim driver savings and highway fund strain create political friction—market underestimates his negotiation flexibility on revenue neutrality or offset mechanisms.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Trump's gas tax relief rhetoric vs. infrastructure lobby pushback; May-June budget negotiations will reveal priority ranking.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Ethereum's market cap exceed Bitcoin's as a percentage, reaching 0.35 or higher by September 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinGecko or CoinMarketCap market cap ratio (ETH/BTC cap ratio ÷ 100)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Privacy layer adoption (Arc, Canton, Tempo, Ethereum Foundation Clear Signing) is catalyst for institutional smart contract migration; Bitcoin dominance narratives overlook Ethereum's stablecoin yield infrastructure (Sky Ecosystem raises $13.5M) as real yield driver.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Tokenization race heating up (JPMorgan new fund, DTCC-Chainlink collateral network); Clear Signing standard reduces friction for institutional onboarding.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will U.S. passenger vehicle sales (domestic + imports) decline by more than 8% YoY in H2 2026 due to Chinese EV tariffs or bans?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: U.S. Federal Reserve Economic Data (FRED): Total Vehicle Sales; Bureau of Economic Analysis; Automotive sector reports
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Michigan bipartisan bill to ban Chinese-connected vehicles is testing ground for broader tariff regime; market hasn't priced inventory disruption or margin compression if bans expand.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Trump heads to Beijing; auto-state lawmakers introducing bans signals hardline turn; prior Chinese EV import shock in 2024-2025 established supply chain fragility.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the CFTC approve at least 2 new sports-linked prediction market licenses or exemptions by June 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CFTC Federal Register notices; CFTC official announcements; prediction market operator public statements (Polymarket, Kalshi, etc.)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CFTC in active talks with 'every major pro sports league' but regulatory timeline and corporate risk appetite remain uncertain—market discounts political pressure from sports betting lobbies and gaming commissions.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk: 'U.S. CFTC in talks with every major pro sports league on policing prediction markets'—coordination phase implies approval window Q2-Q3 2026.

investment_theses.thesis: Long DXY (USD strength) via short bonds or long USD/JPY carry, as Fed hawkishness (Warsh chair signal) and Iran war fiscal drag push real rates higher into Q3 2026.
supporting_signals: Kevin Warsh Fed confirmation with Chair vote expected signals hawkish regime shift (CoinDesk)
US inflation at 3.8%, highest since May 2023, with energy component locked in by Iran war (BBC World)
Trump gas tax relief floated but highway fund pressure limits fiscal stimulus room (CNBC)
investment_theses.counter_view: If Iran ceasefire holds (currently on 'life support' per Trump), oil crashes and Fed pauses—risk-off USD strength reverses to equity rally + weak dollar.
investment_theses.expression: Long DXY via DBC (commodity shorts), short TLT (20Y Treasuries), or long USD/JPY carry trade at 150+ strike

investment_theses.thesis: Accumulate ETH on weakness into 0.32–0.35 BTC/ETH ratio, as privacy-layer ecosystem maturation and institutional stablecoin yield infrastructure (DTCC-Chainlink, Sky funding) drive smart contract adoption velocity in Q3-Q4 2026.
supporting_signals: Ethereum Foundation Clear Signing standard reduces user-approval friction for institutional DeFi (CoinDesk)
DTCC + Chainlink 24/7 collateral network goes live—removes settlement latency barrier for TradFi (Cointelegraph)
Stablecoin yield infrastructure capital raise ($13.5M Sky round) signals institutional appetite for Ethereum-native treasury products (CoinDesk)
investment_theses.counter_view: Bitcoin dominance extends on geopolitical safe-haven demand (Iran war, Ukraine); Solana/Sui alt-L1 innovation outpaces Ethereum on throughput; privacy coin regulation (Monero, Zcash crackdowns) spooks institutional adoption.
investment_theses.expression: Long ETH/USD on dips to $2,000–$2,200; long ETH/BTC ratio via ETH spot + BTC short perps; long Ethereum ETF with 3-month calls at $2,600 strike

investment_theses.thesis: Short crude oil (WTI/Brent) into August 2026 on bet that Iran ceasefire holds and geopolitical premium unwinds, despite near-term war-driven volatility; hedge via long gold (safe-haven floor).
supporting_signals: Iran ceasefire negotiations ongoing but Trump criticism ('unbelievably weak') signals leverage for negotiated halt by late June (BBC World)
Fed rate hike signals (Warsh) will pressure oil demand via credit tightening into H2 2026 (CoinDesk, BBC)
Trump Beijing trip imminent—diplomatic opening could defuse Strait of Hormuz lockdown risk (36Kr, CNBC)
investment_theses.counter_view: Trump restarts strikes (can bypass Congress per Hegseth), Strait of Hormuz fully blockaded, oil rips to $110–$120/barrel; geopolitical tail risk reprices above fundamental demand.
investment_theses.expression: Short crude via USO or CL (WTI) futures, Oct 2026 contract; hedge with long GLD or gold futures (Jun/Aug 2026)

investment_theses.thesis: Long semiconductor supply-chain hedges (MU, INTC short-dated calls) as GPU futures market launch signals institutional panic on capex and rental costs; AI opex inflation becomes margin compressor.
supporting_signals: CNBC: 'Traders will soon be able to bet on computer chip prices as AI drives costs skyward' + GPU rental rate hedging emerges (May 2026)
Google Gemini Android rollout + Google search AI reboot signal sustained compute demand but also competitive margin pressure on GPU makers (CNBC)
36Kr: Quantum computing and AI infra capex still accelerating in China—global demand unlikely to cool (波色量子 100+ enterprise deployments)
investment_theses.counter_view: NVIDIA margin expansion continues as new architectures (Blackwell) offset competition; AI efficiency improvements (distillation, pruning) reduce per-task GPU cost; AWS/Azure capex budgets plateau by Q4 2026.
investment_theses.expression: Long MU (Micron) via Jul 2026 $75 calls; long semiconductor sector ETF (SMH) delta-hedged with NVDA short calls; long GPU futures if accessible

investment_theses.thesis: Long BTC perps (leverage 3–5x) into late May/early June 2026 on macro-driven relief rally if Iran ceasefire holds, dollar retraces, and tech mega-cap CapEx beats expectations; exit into early July to avoid Warsh Chair vote/rate volatility.
supporting_signals: Bitcoin bull-bear cycle indicator just turned green for first time since March 2023 (CoinDesk)—historical setup for 10–15% rally into summer
XRP ETF inflows (largest since January) signal risk-on mood shift in crypto (Cointelegraph)
Crypto market structure bill advancing + JPMorgan tokenized fund launch = regulatory tailwind into summer (CoinDesk, Cointelegraph)
investment_theses.counter_view: Fed Warsh confirmation triggers hawkish repricing, real yields spike, risk assets crash; Iran war escalates, oil rallies, inflation re-accelerates, Fed hikes, BTC dumps to $55k–$60k.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC 3–5x leverage perps (Deribit, Bybit) May 25 – June 15 2026; long BTC call spreads (Jun/Jul $65K–$70K); reduce to spot holdings by July 1
